ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_role" TEXT /* Job role of the employee */,
  "salary_level" TEXT /* Salary level of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_levels" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "satisfaction_level" REAL /* Satisfaction level of the employee (0-1) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Textual feedback from the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satisfaction_levels_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Evaluation score of the employee (0-1) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the project in months */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work hour record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "average_hours" INTEGER /* Average monthly working hours */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month (1-12) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Overtime hours worked in the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_time" (
  "company_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company time record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Years of service at the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_time_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "accident_description" TEXT /* Description of the accident */,
  "accident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_accidents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion */,
  "previous_job_role" TEXT /* Job role before the promotion */,
  "new_job_role" TEXT /* Job role after the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary_level" TEXT /* Salary level of the employee */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Exact salary amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
